description: Trigger any item job on demand with optional polling. Works for any item type (notebooks, pipelines, spark jobs, etc.).
notes: Known job types: RunNotebook, Pipeline, sparkjob, RefreshGraph, refreshMaterializedLakeViews, TableMaintenance. Without --wait, returns immediately with status=accepted and jobId. Use --cancel-on-timeout to auto-cancel if deadline is reached. Poll interval: 5 seconds.

query_examples.description: Job instance ID for further queries.
